---
title: "Cute map of Ukraine"
author: "Daria Nechepaieva"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: true
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(maps)
library(sp) 
library(png)
library(grid)


img <- readPNG("kitty.png")
img_grob <- rasterGrob(img, interpolate = TRUE)

ukraine_map <- map_data("world", region = "Ukraine")

cities <- data.frame(
  city = c("Uzhhorod", "Kyiv", "Myrhorod"),
  emoji = c("⭐", "⭐", "⭐"), 
  lon = c(22.2879, 30.5234, 33.6083),
  lat = c(48.6208, 50.4501, 49.9675)
)

grid_data <- expand.grid(
  lon = seq(22.0, 40.2, by = 0.45),
  lat = seq(44.2, 52.5, by = 0.45)
)

inside <- point.in.polygon(
  point.x = grid_data$lon, 
  point.y = grid_data$lat, 
  pol.x = ukraine_map$long,  
  pol.y = ukraine_map$lat   
)

hearts_bg <- grid_data[inside > 0, ]

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = ukraine_map, aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "pink", color = "turquoise", linewidth = 1.5) +
  coord_quickmap() +
  
  geom_text(data = hearts_bg, aes(x = lon, y = lat), label = "🤍",
            color = "white", size = 3, alpha = 0.7, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  annotation_custom(
    grob = img_grob, 
    xmin = 30.0, xmax = 33.0,  
    ymin = 47.5, ymax = 49.5   
  ) +
  
  geom_text(data = cities, aes(x = lon, y = lat, label = emoji),
            size = 6, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  geom_label(data = cities, aes(x = lon, y = lat, label = city),
             vjust = 0.5, hjust = -0.1, nudge_x = 0.2, 
             fontface = "bold.italic", color = "#5B3436", size = 4.5,
             fill = "white", linewidth = NA, alpha = 0.8, 
             inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  ggtitle("🎨 The cities that I love",
          subtitle = "☀️ I love cool maps and cool cities") +
  xlab("Longitude ❤️") +
  ylab("Latitude ❤️") +
  
  theme_minimal() + 
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "pink", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#AFE4E9", color = NA),
    
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    
    axis.title.x = element_text(color = "hotpink", face = "bold.italic", size = 12, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(color = "hotpink", face = "bold.italic", size = 12, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    
    plot.title = element_text(color = "purple", face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(t = 15, b = 5)),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "purple", face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0.5, margin = margin(b = 15)),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)
  )

```
